issues.description: Round-1 verifier claimed src/test/suite/actionRegistry.test.ts is internally inconsistent: the `expected` set allegedly contains 17 distinct command IDs while the test asserts ROW_ACTIONS.length === 16, so the reported green TS suite would be unreliable.
issues.verificationMethod: Round-1 static inspection with a manual count of the expected-set members (the count included openFolder and openPlaywright).
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Run the single ActionRegistry count test, then the full TS suite.
issues.resolution_notes: False positive — Round-1 miscount. The committed expected block contains exactly 16 strings (scripted regex count); openFolder and the Playwright reveal command were never members (Command-Palette-only per the Set 048 L2 lock). The test passes as committed, including the independent deepStrictEqual membership check, and the full TS suite re-ran 730 passing + 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures. Round-2 gpt-5-4 re-verify accepted the disposition: VERIFIED.
